title: POST_NOTIFICATIONS never requested at runtime; permission dialog appears without context
description: On Android 13+ (API 33) the system auto-shows a POST_NOTIFICATIONS permission dialog the first time startForeground() fires. No in-app rationale is shown first. If denied, the notification is silently absent (users see no 'Relay connected' indicator); they will file issues. Maintenance consequence: class of 'notification missing' reports from Android 13+ users who tapped Deny.
